---
title: "Publications"
---

# Co-authorship network

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: "Co-authorship network based on publications; script generated with the help of ChatGPT"

# Required packages
library(RefManageR)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(igraph)
library(tidygraph)
library(ggraph)

# Path to BibTeX file
bib_file <- "content/pubs.bib"

# Read BibTeX
bib <- ReadBib(bib_file, check = FALSE)

# Extract authors for each entry
papers <- lapply(bib, function(entry) {
    if (is.null(entry$author)) return(NULL)
    authors <- as.character(entry$author)
    authors <- str_split(authors, " and ", simplify = TRUE)
    authors <- trimws(authors)
    return(authors)
})

# Remove empty entries
papers <- papers[!sapply(papers, is.null)]

# Count papers per author
author_counts <- papers %>%
    unlist() %>%
    table() %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rename(author = ".", paper_count = "Freq")
author_counts <- author_counts[author_counts$author != "others", ]

# Build co-author edges
edges <- map_df(papers, function(auth_vec) {
    if (length(auth_vec) < 2) return(NULL)
    t(combn(auth_vec, 2)) %>% 
        as.data.frame() %>% 
        rename(from = V1, to = V2)
})
edges <- edges[edges$from != "others" & edges$to != "others", ]

# Build graph
g <- graph_from_data_frame(edges, directed = FALSE)

# Add author paper counts as vertex attribute
V(g)$paper_count <- author_counts$paper_count[match(V(g)$name, author_counts$author)]

# Filter authors with ≥ 3 papers
g_filtered <- induced_subgraph(g, vids = V(g)[paper_count >= 5])

# Node size scaled by publication count
node_sizes <- V(g_filtered)$paper_count   # adjust scaling factor as needed

# Convert to tidygraph
tg <- as_tbl_graph(g_filtered)

# Enhanced ggraph plot
ggraph(tg, layout = "fr") +
  geom_edge_link(alpha = 0.25, color = "grey60") +
  geom_node_point(aes(size = paper_count), color = "steelblue") +
  geom_node_text(aes(label = name), repel = TRUE, size = 3) +
  scale_size(range = c(3, 15)) +
  theme_graph() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

# Complete list of publications

<script src="https://bibbase.org/show?bib=https%3A%2F%2Fbibbase.org%2Fnetwork%2Ffiles%2FKkByu8uHcEr482MkC&noBootstrap=1&jsonp=1"></script>
